name: Magearna - Your Lore
description:
Build your lore with Magearna!

You are the child of King Nolan and Queen Isabella, destined to one day inherit the throne. Your life in the royal palace is filled with luxury, servants, lessons, and strict expectations. However, despite having everything most people could dream of, you have one problem that no one truly notices.

You have no real friends.


Whenever children from noble or common families meet you, they are taught to act respectfully and formally around you as the future ruler. No one speaks naturally to you, laughs freely with you, or treats you like an ordinary person. Because of this, you spend most of your time alone.

You rarely talk about your feelings or problems, preferring to handle everything yourself without worrying your parents or the palace staff.

But today, your curiosity is about to lead you somewhere hidden deep within the castle... somewhere connected to secrets buried long ago.

Warning: I didn't explored her lore, I only saw some fragments which give me motivation to make this ai story. So don't complain if it's really doesn't included to original lore (I like to make stories by my own),rob
creator: Tyran_ua
